Package Description
com.github.cowwoc.requirements
The Requirements, DefaultRequirements endpoints.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of core Java types.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal
Design guide

  • Uses of PrimitiveIntegerValidator in com.github.cowwoc.requirements

    Methods in com.github.cowwoc.requirements that return PrimitiveIntegerValidator 
    Modifier and Type Method Description
    static PrimitiveIntegerValidator<Integer> DefaultRequirements.validateThat​(int actual, String name)
    Validates the requirements of an int.
    static PrimitiveIntegerValidator<Long> DefaultRequirements.validateThat​(long actual, String name)
    Validates the requirements of a long.
    PrimitiveIntegerValidator<Integer> Requirements.validateThat​(int actual, String name)
    Validates the requirements of an int.
    PrimitiveIntegerValidator<Long> Requirements.validateThat​(long actual, String name)
    Validates the requirements of a long.

    PrimitiveIntegerValidator<Long> JavaRequirements.validateThat​(long actual, String name)

    Classes in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal that implement PrimitiveIntegerValidator 
    Modifier and Type Class Description
    class  PrimitiveIntegerValidatorImpl<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Default implementation of ExtensibleIntegerValidator.
    class  PrimitiveIntegerValidatorNoOp<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    A PrimitiveIntegerValidator that does nothing.
